name: Bird Shredder Toys, Bird Chewing Toys Arouse Bird's Interest. Bright Colors for Pets Parrots
description: Feature:1. The product uses natural paper silk and basket weaving materials, which is safe and non-toxic, and does not harm the health of pets.2. The colors are bright and can attract the attention of pet birds, and the will make a crisp sound when biting and playing on it.3. After the paper shreds are consumed, you can buy a replacement pack and refill it, or place some ears of and sorghum as a substitute.4. While maintaining sufficient strength, the plastic lock on the basket can be disassembled at will to achieve the ideal suspension height.5. There are two bells on the head of the product.
